message:
fix(fm-render-svg): apply clippy lints across SVG renderer

Inline format arguments, use Self instead of concrete type name in
struct and method signatures, replace .filter().is_some() with
.is_some_and() for cleaner option predicates, simplify negated
condition (!= None -> == None with swapped branches) for attribute
font_weight, use char literals instead of single-char strings in
contains() calls, and simplify raw string literals.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
